## Checklist

-   [ ] `bun run format:check` passes
-   [ ] `bun run lint` passes
-   [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
-   [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
-   [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
-   [ ] README updated if public API changed
